---
title: "ONT survey Response Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
survey <- read_excel("ONT in the Community Survey_Response Export.xlsx")
```

```{r}
library(janitor)
survey <- survey %>% clean_names()
colnames(survey)
```

```{r}
colnames(survey)
glimpse(survey)
```


```{r}
find_col <- function(df, keyword) {
  nm <- names(df)
  hit <- nm[str_detect(nm, keyword)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hit[1]
}

col_fly_last_year     <- find_col(survey, "how_many_times.*flown.*last_year|flown.*last_year")
col_ont_last_year     <- find_col(survey, "how_many_times.*ont.*last_year|flown_out_of_ont")
col_consider_ont      <- find_col(survey, "would_you_consider.*ont|consider_flying")
col_airport_most      <- find_col(survey, "which_airport.*most|airport_use_most")
col_seen_heard        <- find_col(survey, "have_you_seen_or_heard.*ont|seen_or_heard")
col_zip               <- find_col(survey, "zip|zipcode|zip_code")
col_email_opt_in      <- find_col(survey, "email|opt_in|newsletter")

print(col_fly_last_year)
print(col_ont_last_year)
print(col_consider_ont)
print(col_airport_most)
print(col_seen_heard)
print(col_zip)
print(col_email_opt_in)
```

```{r}
survey_clean <- survey

# Convert selected columns to character safely
for (col in c(col_fly_last_year, col_ont_last_year, col_consider_ont,
              col_airport_most, col_seen_heard, col_zip, col_email_opt_in)) {
  if (!is.na(col) && col %in% names(survey_clean)) {
    survey_clean[[col]] <- as.character(survey_clean[[col]])
  }
}
```


```{r}
extract_number <- function(x) {
  as.numeric(str_extract(x, "\\d+"))
}

# Build variables only when columns exist
if (!is.na(col_fly_last_year)) {
  survey_clean$flights_last_year_num <- extract_number(survey_clean[[col_fly_last_year]])
}

if (!is.na(col_ont_last_year)) {
  survey_clean$ont_flights_last_year_num <- extract_number(survey_clean[[col_ont_last_year]])
}

if (!is.na(col_consider_ont)) {
  survey_clean$consider_ont_yes <- ifelse(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(survey_clean[[col_consider_ont]]), "yes"), 1, 0
  )
}

if (!is.na(col_airport_most)) {
  survey_clean$uses_ont_most <- ifelse(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(survey_clean[[col_airport_most]]), "ont|ontario"), 1, 0
  )
}

if (!is.na(col_seen_heard)) {
  survey_clean$community_event_exposed <- ifelse(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(survey_clean[[col_seen_heard]]), "community"), 1, 0
  )

  survey_clean$social_media_exposed <- ifelse(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(survey_clean[[col_seen_heard]]), "social"), 1, 0
  )

  survey_clean$awareness_channel_count <- str_count(survey_clean[[col_seen_heard]], ",") + 1
  survey_clean$awareness_channel_count[is.na(survey_clean[[col_seen_heard]])] <- NA
}

if (!is.na(col_email_opt_in)) {
  survey_clean$email_opt_in_yes <- ifelse(
    str_detect(str_to_lower(survey_clean[[col_email_opt_in]]), "yes"), 1, 0
  )
}

if (!is.na(col_zip)) {
  survey_clean$zip_code_clean <- str_extract(survey_clean[[col_zip]], "\\d{5}")
}
```


```{r}
survey_clean <- survey_clean %>%
  mutate(
    behavior_score = case_when(
      !is.na(ont_flights_last_year_num) ~ ont_flights_last_year_num,
      !is.na(flights_last_year_num) ~ flights_last_year_num * 0.5,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    awareness_score = case_when(
      !is.na(awareness_channel_count) ~ awareness_channel_count,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    intent_score = case_when(
      !is.na(consider_ont_yes) ~ consider_ont_yes,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
overall_summary <- survey_clean %>%
  summarise(
    responses = n(),
    avg_flights_last_year = mean(flights_last_year_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_ont_flights_last_year = mean(ont_flights_last_year_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_consider_ont = mean(consider_ont_yes, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_uses_ont_most = mean(uses_ont_most, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_community_event_exposed = mean(community_event_exposed, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_social_media_exposed = mean(social_media_exposed, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_awareness_channels = mean(awareness_channel_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_email_opt_in = mean(email_opt_in_yes, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_consider_ont = percent(pct_consider_ont, accuracy = 0.1),
    pct_uses_ont_most = percent(pct_uses_ont_most, accuracy = 0.1),
    pct_community_event_exposed = percent(pct_community_event_exposed, accuracy = 0.1),
    pct_social_media_exposed = percent(pct_social_media_exposed, accuracy = 0.1),
    pct_email_opt_in = percent(pct_email_opt_in, accuracy = 0.1)
  )

print(overall_summary)
```


```{r}
zip_summary <- survey_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(zip_code_clean)) %>%
  count(zip_code_clean, sort = TRUE)

print(head(zip_summary, 15))
```


```{r}
if ("community_event_exposed" %in% names(survey_clean) &&
    "consider_ont_yes" %in% names(survey_clean)) {

  exposure_summary <- survey_clean %>%
    group_by(community_event_exposed) %>%
    summarise(
      responses = n(),
      pct_consider_ont = mean(consider_ont_yes, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_behavior_score = mean(behavior_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_awareness_score = mean(awareness_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      community_event_exposed = ifelse(community_event_exposed == 1, "Exposed", "Not Exposed"),
      pct_consider_ont = percent(pct_consider_ont, accuracy = 0.1)
    )

  print(exposure_summary)
}

```



```{r}
if ("uses_ont_most" %in% names(survey_clean) &&
    "consider_ont_yes" %in% names(survey_clean)) {

  airport_summary <- survey_clean %>%
    group_by(uses_ont_most) %>%
    summarise(
      responses = n(),
      pct_consider_ont = mean(consider_ont_yes, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_ont_flights = mean(ont_flights_last_year_num, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      uses_ont_most = ifelse(uses_ont_most == 1, "Uses ONT Most", "Uses Other Airport Most"),
      pct_consider_ont = percent(pct_consider_ont, accuracy = 0.1)
    )

  print(airport_summary)
}
```



```{r}
ggplot(head(zip_summary, 10), aes(x = reorder(zip_code_clean, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top ZIP Codes in ONT Community Survey",
    x = "ZIP Code",
    y = "Responses"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r}
if (exists("exposure_summary")) {
  ggplot(exposure_summary, aes(x = community_event_exposed, y = as.numeric(str_remove(pct_consider_ont, "%")))) +
    geom_col() +
    labs(
      title = "Consider Flying ONT by Community Event Exposure",
      x = "Community Event Exposure",
      y = "Percent Considering ONT"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
```


```{r}
if ("ont_flights_last_year_num" %in% names(survey_clean)) {
  ggplot(survey_clean, aes(x = ont_flights_last_year_num)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of Flights Out of ONT in Last Year",
      x = "Number of ONT Flights",
      y = "Respondents"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
```


```{r}
 survey_clean <- survey %>%
  mutate(
    intent_score = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today), "yes|definitely") ~ 1,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today), "maybe|likely") ~ 0.5,
      str_detect(str_to_lower(would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today), "no|not") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
unique(survey$would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today)
```



```{r}
ao4_survey_model <- lm(
  intent_score ~ awareness_score + behavior_score + community_event_exposed + social_media_exposed,
  data = survey_clean
)

summary(ao4_survey_model)
```


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)

survey <- read_excel("ONT in the Community Survey_Response Export.xlsx") %>%
  clean_names()

# Inspect raw values first
unique(survey$how_many_times_have_you_flown_in_the_last_year)
unique(survey$how_many_times_have_you_flown_out_of_ont_in_the_last_year)
unique(survey$would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today)
unique(survey$which_airport_do_you_use_the_most)

table(survey$community_event, useNA = "ifany")
table(survey$social_media, useNA = "ifany")
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# Start from the cleaned survey
survey_clean <- survey %>%
  mutate(
    # 1) behavior variables
    flights_last_year_num = as.numeric(str_extract(how_many_times_have_you_flown_in_the_last_year, "\\d+")),
    ont_flights_last_year_num = as.numeric(str_extract(how_many_times_have_you_flown_out_of_ont_in_the_last_year, "\\d+")),

    # 2) intent variable
    consider_ont_yes = case_when(
      str_to_lower(would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today) %in% c("yes", "y") ~ 1,
      str_to_lower(would_you_consider_flying_out_of_ont_after_today) %in% c("no", "n") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # 3) airport usage
    uses_ont_most = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(which_airport_do_you_use_the_most), "ont|ontario") ~ 1,
      is.na(which_airport_do_you_use_the_most) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    # 4) channel exposure columns are already separate in your file
    social_media_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(social_media) ~ 0,
      social_media != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    online_ad_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(online_ad) ~ 0,
      online_ad != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    billboard_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(billboard) ~ 0,
      billboard != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    tv_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(tv_commercial) ~ 0,
      tv_commercial != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    radio_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(radio) ~ 0,
      radio != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    community_event_exposed = case_when(
      is.na(community_event) ~ 0,
      community_event != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    not_seen_anywhere = case_when(
      is.na(i_have_not_seen_or_heard_ont_anywhere) ~ 0,
      i_have_not_seen_or_heard_ont_anywhere != "" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),

    # 5) awareness score = number of channels selected
    awareness_score =
      social_media_exposed +
      online_ad_exposed +
      billboard_exposed +
      tv_exposed +
      radio_exposed +
      community_event_exposed,

    # 6) behavior score
    behavior_score = case_when(
      !is.na(ont_flights_last_year_num) ~ ont_flights_last_year_num,
      !is.na(flights_last_year_num) ~ flights_last_year_num * 0.5,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # 7) final intent score
    intent_score = consider_ont_yes,

    # 8) email opt-in
    email_opt_in_yes = case_when(
      str_to_lower(do_you_want_to_receive_marketing_and_promotion_emails_from_ont_regarding_discounts_new_route_announcements_and_more) %in% c("yes", "y") ~ 1,
      str_to_lower(do_you_want_to_receive_marketing_and_promotion_emails_from_ont_regarding_discounts_new_route_announcements_and_more) %in% c("no", "n") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```


```{r}
summary(survey_clean[, c(
  "intent_score",
  "awareness_score",
  "behavior_score",
  "community_event_exposed",
  "social_media_exposed"
)])
```


```{r}
survey_model_data <- survey_clean %>%
  select(intent_score, awareness_score, behavior_score, community_event_exposed, social_media_exposed) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(intent_score),
    !is.na(awareness_score),
    !is.na(behavior_score)
  )

nrow(survey_model_data)
head(survey_model_data)
```

```{r}
ao4_survey_model <- lm(
  intent_score ~ awareness_score + behavior_score + community_event_exposed + social_media_exposed,
  data = survey_model_data
)

summary(ao4_survey_model)
```


```{r}
overall_summary <- survey_clean %>%
  summarise(
    responses = n(),
    avg_flights_last_year = mean(flights_last_year_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_ont_flights_last_year = mean(ont_flights_last_year_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_consider_ont = mean(intent_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_uses_ont_most = mean(uses_ont_most, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_community_event_exposed = mean(community_event_exposed, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_social_media_exposed = mean(social_media_exposed, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_awareness_score = mean(awareness_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_email_opt_in = mean(email_opt_in_yes, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(overall_summary)
```


```{r}
exposure_summary <- survey_clean %>%
  group_by(community_event_exposed) %>%
  summarise(
    responses = n(),
    pct_consider_ont = mean(intent_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_behavior_score = mean(behavior_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_awareness_score = mean(awareness_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(exposure_summary)
```


```{r}
ggplot(exposure_summary, aes(x = factor(community_event_exposed), y = pct_consider_ont)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Consider Flying ONT by Community Event Exposure",
    x = "Community Event Exposure (0 = No, 1 = Yes)",
    y = "Percent Considering ONT"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
summary(ao4_survey_model)
```
